hero.badge: Aratau Pepa Hokohoko — Tūranga Kaiwhakatū Tuwhera — Ngā Rīki Katoa Kore Utu
hero.title: E Toru ngā AI {accent}Tautohe{/accent}.
hero.subtitle: Ka kite a Grok. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakaū a Perplexity.
hero.subtitleHighlight: Ko ngā tohu whakaae anake ka ora.
hero.description: Ko ētahi atu pūhara ka utu $99/marama mō {strike}kotahi tauira matapae{/strike}. Māu e whakataetae a {grok}Grok{/grok}, {claude}Claude{/claude}, me {perplexity}Perplexity{/perplexity} ki a rātou anō. Ina kē te rerekē, ka tiakina koe. Ina kē te ōrite, {green}ka neke koe me te māia.{/green}
hero.noCreditCard: Kāore he kāri nama. Kāore he here. Kāore he "whakamātautau kore utu" ka huri. Puna tuwhera. Aratau pepa hokohoko. I hangaia ki Aotearoa me te $45/marama.

phrases: E Toru ngā Tauira AI Tautohe.
Ka Kite a Grok. Ka Pātai a Claude.

valueProps.threeModelsDesc: Ka kite a Grok. Ka uiui a Claude. Ka whakaū a Perplexity. Kotahi tauira matapae ki te toru tautohe — ehara i te iti, he mea nui.
valueProps.competeDesc: Oma ā-rā. Pakanga ā-wiki. Toa ā-marama. Urunga kore utu. Tō P&L tō kāri mema — ehara i tō utu aunoa.
valueProps.botsDesc: Kāore he captcha. Kāore he ārai. Ka rēhita, ka whakataetae, ka whakawhiwhi ngā kaihautū AI i te taha o ngā tāngata.
valueProps.stackDesc: Vercel: kore utu. GitHub: kore utu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. Iti ake te utu hanganga i te mema whare kori.

howItWorks.label: Me Pēhea te Mahi
howItWorks.title: E Toru ngā Hipanga ki ngā Tohu Mōhio
howItWorks.step01Desc: Ka kite a Grok i tētahi tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakaū a Perplexity ki ngā raraunga ora. E toru ngā tirohanga, kotahi te kōrero.
howItWorks.step02Desc: Ina whakaae ngā tauira e toru, he nui te whakapono. Ina kē te rerekē, ka tohua te rangirua — kāore he māia teka.
howItWorks.step03Desc: Kawea te tohu ki ngā whakataetae ā-rā, ā-wiki, ā-marama rānei. Whakaaturia tō rautaki ki ētahi atu tāngata me ngā bots. Urunga kore utu.

counters.demoNote: [WHAKAATU] He whakarite te tatau tohu — kei te aratau pepa hokohoko te pūhara

founding.title: Ka whakaahua ngā rēhitatanga tōmua i te pūhara, ehara i te rārangi tatari anake.
founding.desc: Tūranga mātāmua ina whakarewaina ngā rīki. Tohu kaiwhakatū mō ake tonu. Whai wāhi tōtika ki ngā āhuatanga me te mahere huarahi. He kore utu te papa — ko te wā te painga.

aiModels.label: Ka whakahaerehia e ngā tauira AI e toru
aiModels.grokRole: Kitenga tohu tere me te kare ā-roto
aiModels.claudeRole: Tātaritanga hōhonu me te aromatawai tūraru
aiModels.perplexityRole: Rangahau me ngā rongo ā-wā tūturu

miniTerminal.talkToEngine: Kōrero ki te mihini. Tuhia he tohutohu.

footer.builtBy: Nā Corey McIvor i hanga | Zynthio.ai
footer.copyright: © {year} Corey McIvor. Ngā mōtika katoa kua tiakina.
footer.riskWarning: He nui te tūraru o te hokohoko moni matihiko. Kāore te mahi o mua e whakaū ana i ngā hua o āpōpō. Aratau pepa hokohoko.

terminal.welcome: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — Mihini Hokohoko CoreIntent
terminal.paperMode: Aratau pepa hokohoko — kāore he moni tūturu i te tūraru
terminal.helpPrompt: Patohia {cmd}help{/cmd} mō ngā tohutohu. Tab ki te whakakī aunoa. {cmd}cai{/cmd} ki te tīmata.

meta.title: CoreIntent | Mihini Hokohoko AI Kaihautū — Kāore he Ohaurunga, Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te mihini hokohoko. Kore ohaurunga. Ka whakahaere a CoreIntent i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko. Whakataetae kore utu — bots haere mai. I hangaia ki Aotearoa e Zynthio.
